Remote sessions needed to manage your entire fleet
The problem

Account management is still a mess for most IT teams.

Most small IT teams manage user accounts via remote access, one machine at a time. There's no central view, no audit trail, and no real visibility into who has access to what.

👻
Hidden Accounts

Ex-employees, temporary vendors, and test users accumulate over time. Each one is an open door.

🔍
No Uniform Visibility

Hard to know how many accounts exist across machines, which are active, or which shouldn't be there at all.

📋
No Audit Trail

Who disabled that account? When? Comprehensive logs make compliance and accountability easy.

⏱️
Manual Work that Doesn't Scale

Remote sessions are slow and tedious. Managing 50 machines this way feels like a full-time job.

Features

Everything you need. Plain and simple.

Central Account Dashboard

View every account across every machine in one place. Filter by status, role, or last logon date.

Remote Account Management

Create, disable, enable, or delete accounts from the dashboard. Actions execute in under 30 seconds — no remote session needed.

Group Management

View local groups and members, add or remove users, create new groups — all from one interface.

Full Audit Log

Every action is recorded: who triggered it, when, on which machine, and what the result was.

Role-based Access

Admins make changes. Viewers see everything but can't touch anything. Right access for every team member.

Lightweight Agent

A small agent on each machine reports inventory every 30 seconds and executes queued actions instantly.

How it works

Up and running in minutes.

No infrastructure required. Works on any Windows machine in your environment.

01
Deploy the Agent

Download and run the Aurigon agent on each machine. Takes about 60 seconds per machine.

02
Machines Appear Automatically

Each agent registers itself and starts uploading account and group inventory. Your machines show up in the dashboard right away.

03
Manage from One Place

Create accounts, disable old ones, and manage groups — all from the dashboard, without touching individual machines.

04
Every Action is Logged

The audit log captures who did what, when, and what the result was — keeping accountability built in from the start.

Who it's for

Built for teams that want to do more with less.

SMBs & Solo Sysadmins

Managing dozens of machines, probably solo or with a small team. You need visibility and control without enterprise complexity or enterprise pricing.

Identity & Access Admins

You care about who has access to what. Aurigon gives you a centralized picture of local accounts and groups across your entire fleet.

Teams Doing a First Audit

Never audited your environment? Aurigon surfaces ghost accounts, unexpected admins, and stale users in minutes — not days.

Get visibility into your environment today.
